questions.question: Who is the highest law officer in a state?
Which of the following Acts aims to prevent money laundering in India?
Which of the following is the Chief Minister of a state in India primarily responsible for?
Protection of environment and wildlife is mentioned in which Article of the Indian Constitution?
What was a major focus of the 61ˢᵗ Constitutional Amendment?
questions.option_1: Reservation of seats for women in Panchayats
questions.option_3: Abolition of Privy Purses for former rulers
questions.option_4: Reduction of voting age from 21 to 18 years

questions.question: Who was the first Chief Election Commissioner of India?
In which list of the Seventh Schedule does the Central Government have exclusive power to legislate?
Which Schedule of the Constitution deals with the administration of Scheduled Areas and Tribes?
In which of the following years was the Right to Information Act passed?
Which if the following is a landmark judgement of Justice Bela Trivedi, whose official retirement is scheduled for June 2025?
questions.option_1: Euthanasia and the Right to Die with Dignity
questions.option_4: Challenge to the Abrogation of Article 370

questions.question: To control over district courts and subordinate judiciary lies with which of the following?
Which British law was a major influence on the Indian Constitution’s institutional framework?
Which of the following is the correct descending order of ministerial ranks in the Union Council of Ministers, as per Indian practice?
questions.option_1: Minister of State → Cabinet Minister → Deputy Minister
questions.option_2: Cabinet Minister → Minister of State → Deputy Minister
questions.option_3: Cabinet Minister → Deputy Minister → Minister of State
questions.option_4: Deputy Minister → Minister of State → Cabinet Minister

questions.question: To pass a Constitutional Amendment Bill in the Lok Sabha, which of the following correctly states the minimum support required?
questions.option_1: Simple majority of Lok Sabha members and two-thirds of Rajya Sabha members present and voting
questions.option_2: Unanimous vote of all Members of Parliament
questions.option_3: Two-thirds majority of the total membership of the House
questions.option_4: Majority of the total membership and two-thirds of members present and voting

questions.question: The Right to Public Services legislation was first introduced by which Indian state?
Which of the following Directive Principles of State Policy is provided under Article 43A of the Indian Constitution?
questions.option_3: Participation of workers in industrial management

questions.question: Under the Legal Services Authorities Act, 1987, Lok Adalats have no jurisdiction to settle which of the following cases?
Which Article provides for the formation of Ward Committees in Municipal areas?
Article 19 of the Indian Constitution guarantees six freedoms. Which of the following is NOT one of them?
questions.option_1: Freedom to form associations or unions
questions.option_2: Freedom to move freely throughout the territory of India

questions.question: Which of the following communities may apply for Indian citizenship after just 6 years of residence, as per the Citizenship (Amendment) Act, 2019?
Which of the following Parliamentary Committees of India is considered a ‘Financial Committee’?
questions.option_4: Committee on Welfare of SCs and STs

questions.question: Under which of the following conditions is a Tribal Advisory Council (TAC) established in a State?
questions.option_2: If there is at least one Scheduled Tribe
questions.option_4: If the State has any forest area

questions.question: Which body is entrusted with recruiting India’s civil servants on the basis of merit?
Under Article 239 of the Constitution, a Union Territory is administered by:
questions.option_1: the Governor of an adjacent State

questions.question: Who is the head of the civil administration of a district court in India?
questions.option_3: Registrar General of the High Court
